debug.title: Debug Tools
debug.help: Pre-populate the form with LumiBot launch video values.
debug.empty: No active generation. Start one to see details here.

form.prompt_placeholder: Describe the video you want to create...
form.audio_placeholder: Write narration text or leave empty for auto-generation

lumi.prompt:
Product launch video for LumiBot — an AI assistant that helps teams automate workflows and boost productivity.

Scene 1 (0-3s): Futuristic title card with glowing "LumiBot" text, subtitle "AI-Powered Workflow Assistant". Dark background with subtle particle effect or radial glow in purple/teal.

Scene 2 (3-7s): Three feature cards side by side. Card 1: "Smart Automation" with robot icon. Card 2: "Team Collaboration" with people icon. Card 3: "24/7 Availability" with clock icon.

Scene 3 (7-10s): Strong CTA panel. "Ready to Transform Your Workflow?" in large bold text. Below: "Get Started at lumi.bot" with glowing button outline effect.
lumi.narration: Introducing LumiBot — your intelligent AI workflow assistant. Automate repetitive tasks, collaborate seamlessly with your team, and keep your projects running 24/7. Ready to transform how you work? Visit Lumi.bot and get started today.
